channel.title: hacking on Blog
channel.description: Recent content in hacking on Blog

item.title: Nmap Cheatsheet
item.description: common useful commands src: https://www.stationx.net/nmap-cheat-sheet Target Specification Switch Example Description nmap 192.168.1.1 Scan a single IP nmap 192.168.1.1 192.168.2.1 Scan specific IPs nmap 192.168.1.1-254 Scan a range nmap scanme.nmap.org Scan a domain nmap 192.168.1.0/24 Scan using CIDR notation -iL nmap -iL targets.txt Scan targets from a file -iR nmap -iR 100 Scan 100 random hosts –exclude nmap –exclude 192.

item.title: Infromation Gathering
item.description: Information Gathering Cheatsheet Chapter 1 - Information Gathering Cheatsheet It can take quite some time to remember all the nuances of commands and arguments for the various tools we must use. It’s almost like learning a second language this is intended as a reference of what to use and how to use it Vi Commands :set paste NMAP Network Scan Arguments -sn - ping scan (disable port scan, assumes all hosts up)
